channel.title: Posts on william4s' blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on william4s' blog

item.title: Java在竞赛中应用
item.description: JAVA快速读入与输出 BufferedReader + String + split import java.io.*; import java.util.*; public class Main { static int f[][]=new int[105][105]; public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException { BufferedReader br=new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in)); BufferedWriter bw = new BufferedWriter(new OutputStreamWriter(System.out)); String line[]=br.readLine().split(" "); int n,m; n=Integer.parseInt(line[0]); m=Integer.parseInt(line[1]); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { line=br.readLine().split(" "); for(int j=1;j<=m;j++) f[i][j]=Integer.parseInt(line[j-1]); } for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) { for(int j=1;j<=m;j++) { bw.write(String.format("%d ", f[i][j])); } bw.write("\n"); } bw.flush(); } } BufferedReader+StringToken（不推荐） import java.io.BufferedReader; import java.
